S1.claim: reward = 0.30*diag + 0.25*fix + 0.45*resolved - 0.60*trap; frozen swappable policy; within-group reward spread; GKE test cluster; 0.86 ceiling = escalate the unsolvable

S2.claim: Live benchmark, 90 SRE problems, fault/noise injectors over real cloud-native stacks; diagnosis 38.9-72.6%, mitigation 57.3-78.5%

S3.claim: Open-source benchmarking platform for SRE agents

S4.claim: Positioned as a live training ground for AI SRE agents (provides environment, not training algorithm)

S5.claim: Klaudia agents; 95% accuracy claim; Cisco 40% ticket reduction / 80% faster MTTR; Cisco/Dell/BlackRock customers

S6.claim: Autonomous self-healing GA; detect/investigate/remediate with or without human in the loop

S7.claim: Independent coverage: Komodor remediates with or without a human in the loop

S8.claim: Bits AI SRE investigates alerts against live telemetry (RUM, profiler, network path, DB); human-in-the-loop triage

S9.claim: Tested across 2,000+ customer environments; tens of thousands of investigations

S10.claim: Internal eval platform built on proprietary labeled real customer incidents; not publicly available

S11.claim: New Bits AI ~2x faster and more accurate on internal benchmark; no independent RCA benchmark exists
